title: Hackers to Follow on Social Media
description: Learn from the Best: Many top hackers share their techniques, tools, and methodologies. Learning directly from their experiences and insights can significantly improve your own skills and understanding

content.introductoryText:
This comprehensive list contains 4 Major Platforms: 
1. Twitter
2. Medium
3. YouTube
4. GitHub
